ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot picking up a thong sandal.  The robot will use a smooth, deliberate movement to avoid appearing clumsy. The sequence will focus on the right arm, while the left arm remains relatively still for balance. Frame 1 shows the right arm extending toward the sandal, slightly angled downward. Frame 2 shows the right arm bending slightly at the shoulder as it grasps the sandal. Frame 3 shows the arm lifting the sandal slightly. Frame 4 shows the arm moving the sandal closer to the body. Frame 5 shows the arm returning to a resting position.

frames.beat: right arm extends down to grasp the thong
the arm bends, securing the sandal
bringing the sandal closer to the body
right arm returns to rest, sandal held
